source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/EN_60SIPT-602230C/EN 300 328 V2.2.2_2.4G WLAN_ST60-SIPT,ST60-2230C_ER740701-08AC.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CE test report ER740701-08AC Rev. 01 evaluates Laird Connectivity 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module model ST60-2230C against EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as supporting test evidence for EN 300 328 V2.2.2 compliance of the listed Laird Connectivity module models, with ST60-2230C selected as the representative final-test model.
keyPoints: The tested sample was declared evaluated and in compliance with EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
Report ER740701-08AC Rev. 01 is a supplementary report to ICC report no. ER740701AC and ER740701-04AC.
The supplementary changes were updating the standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2 and updating applicant name and brand name.

Summary of test results lists Pass for RF Output Power, Power Spectral Density, Adaptivity, Occupied Channel Bandwidth, transmitter unwanted emissions, receiver spurious emissions, and Receiver Blocking.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: The document is CE Test Report ER740701-08AC Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: ER740701-08AC Page : 1 of 219 Report Version: Rev. 01 CE Test Report

evidence.claim: The report was initially issued on Jul. 30, 2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No. Version Description Issued Date ER740701-08AC Rev. 01 Initial issue Jul. 30, 2020

evidence.claim: The equipment under test is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The model number listed on the cover page is ST60-2230C.
ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The applied testing standard is EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07).
evidence.evidenceText: Testing Applied Standards According to the specifications of the manufacturer, the EUT must comply with the requirements of the following standards: EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2019-07)

evidence.claim: The report is supplementary to original ICC report no. ER740701AC and ER740701-04AC.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is issued as a supplementary report to original ICC report no. ER740701AC & ER740701-04AC.

evidence.claim: The supplementary report updates the standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2 and updates applicant and brand name.
evidence.evidenceText: The difference is concerned with following items: Updating standard version from V2.1.1 to V2.2.2. New applicant name & brand name.

evidence.claim: International Certification Corp. declared the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the listed standard.
evidence.evidenceText: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: RF Output Power measured result was 19.86 dBm and passed.
Power Spectral Density met the requirement of limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.2.3 Power Spectral Density Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Adaptivity met the requirement of limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.2.6 Adaptivity Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Occupied Channel Bandwidth met the requirement of limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.2.7 Occupied Channel Bandwidth Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Receiver Blocking met the requirement of limit and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.2.11 Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Geo-location Capability was not applicable because the device has no such capability.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3.2.12 Geo-location Capability The device has no this capability. N/A

evidence.claim: The EUT frequency band is 2400 to 2483.5 MHz for 802.11 b/g/n modes.
The EUT uses DC 3.3V power from host.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Type DC 3.3V from host

evidence.claim: Deviation from test standard and measurement procedure was none.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.6 Deviation from Test Standard and Measurement Procedure None

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is inferred from 'CE Test Report'; no issuing regulatory authority is named in the source text.
Source text includes many plot/image pages where detailed numeric tables appear absent from OCR; summary and textual tables were used for extraction.
